title: Warm & Cold
description: A simple yet effective mod, that adds warm & cold variants of every flower type!
body:
![Warm&Cold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c07e1965889ee981d055625d10db2b28c47d64c.png)

A simple aesthetic mod that adds, you guessed it, Warm & Cold flowers!

Make Cold Flowers by putting a Snowball and your flower of choice in a Crafting Table!


Make Warm Flowers by putting your flower of choice in a Smoker!


Made with **[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)**
